macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US GDP Grows 2% in Q1 2026, Below Expectations Amid AI Boom and Inflation Pressures
items.summary: The US economy expanded at a 2% annualized rate in the first quarter of 2026, slower than the 2.2% forecast, driven by an 8.7% surge in AI-related business investment but tempered by slowing consumer spending at 1.6% and elevated inflation with PCE price index at 4.5%. Energy prices hit wartime highs due to the Iran war, pushing gasoline to $4.30/gallon and Brent crude over $126/barrel.[1][2]
items.source: CBS News / Bureau of Economic Analysis

items.title: US PCE Inflation Surges to 4.5% in Q1, Well Above Fed's 2% Target
items.summary: The personal consumption expenditures (PCE) price index rose 4.5% annualized in Q1 2026, up from 2.9% last quarter, with core PCE at 4.3%, signaling persistent inflationary pressures amid the Iran war's impact on energy costs.[1][2]

items.title: US Initial Jobless Claims Drop to 189K, Signaling Resilient Labor Market
items.summary: Initial jobless claims fell to 189K, beating expectations of 215K, while the 4-week average eased to 207.5K, indicating ongoing strength in the US job market despite economic headwinds.[3]

items.title: US New Home Sales Plunge 17.6% in March Amid High Rates and Costs
items.summary: New home sales dropped sharply by 17.6% month-over-month to 0.587 million units, missing forecasts and reversing prior gains, reflecting housing market weakness.[3]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Dogecoin Surges to Two-Month High Above $0.10
items.summary: Dogecoin's price has risen above $0.10, marking a two-month high with a 138% increase in trading volume, amid a broader market decline. It leads gainers with up to 6.19% rise while overall crypto market cap falls 1.09% to $2.53 trillion.

items.title: $492 Million in Crypto Liquidations Over Past 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw $492 million in liquidations in the last 24 hours, primarily affecting long positions, amid a 1.09% drop in total market cap to $2.53 trillion.

items.title: Bitcoin Faces Sell Wall Between $80,500 and $82,000
items.summary: Large traders have built a significant sell wall on Bitcoin between $80,500 and $82,000, contributing to market resistance as BTC holds near $76K after a dip.

items.title: Solana Price Drops to $81.90, Hits Record Low RSI
items.summary: Solana's price fell 2.15% to $81.90, testing support at $81.65 with the lowest Relative Strength Index (RSI) on record, signaling potential further decline to $78.80.

items.title: Tether Proposes Merger of Bitcoin Treasury, Mining, and Financial Services
items.summary: Tether plans a three-way merger of its bitcoin treasury, mining operations, and financial services to streamline efficiency.

items.title: Coinbase to List WRON and MEGA Tokens, Expands AI and Virtual Services
items.summary: Coinbase is expanding services by listing WRON and MEGA tokens to enhance AI and virtual asset support and improve market visibility.

items.title: Meta Adds USDC Payments for Content Creators via MetaMask, Phantom, Binance
items.summary: Meta has introduced USDC as a payment option for creators, enabling quick transactions through MetaMask, Phantom, and Binance wallets.

items.title: Ethereum Eyes Potential 140% Rally if Key Resistance Breaks
items.summary: Ethereum is positioned for a possible 140% rally upon overcoming key resistance, despite current struggles and a 2.21% price drop.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google DeepMind Unveils Vision Banana, Outperforming Specialized Vision Models
items.summary: Vision Banana, built by instruction-tuning Nano Banana Pro, beats five specialized models in tasks like semantic segmentation (0.699 mIoU vs. SAM 3's 0.652) and depth estimation (0.882 vs. UniK3D's 0.823). This breakthrough positions image generation as a universal interface for visual understanding.

items.title: OpenAI Secures 10GW of US AI Compute Capacity Ahead of 2029 Goal
items.summary: OpenAI signed contracts for 10GW of compute, adding over 3GW in the past 90 days, accelerating data center expansion plans years early. This supports ambitious scaling for advanced models.

items.title: Mistral AI Raises $830M in Debt for NVIDIA-Powered Data Center Near Paris
items.summary: Mistral AI secured $830 million to construct a major data center, enhancing its compute infrastructure for AI development. The funding underscores Europe's push in AI hardware.

items.title: Google Launches TPU 8i and 8t Chips with 80% Better Performance-Per-Dollar
items.summary: TPU 8i offers 80% improvement in performance-per-dollar for agentic workflows, while TPU 8t boosts training speed 3x. Announced alongside Gemini Enterprise for secure AI deployment.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni for Multimodal AI Agents
items.summary: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni processes video, audio, images, and text, making AI agents 9x faster and cheaper without quality loss. It targets efficient multimodal applications.

items.title: Auctor Raises $20M Led by Sequoia for AI Enterprise Software Implementation
items.summary: Auctor secured $20 million to develop an 'AI System of Action' automating enterprise software deployments. The funding highlights investor focus on AI operational tools.

items.title: Featherless.ai Raises $20M Series A for Serverless AI Inference
items.summary: Serverless platform Featherless.ai, supporting 30,000+ open models, raised $20M co-led by AMD Ventures and Airbus Ventures. It enables scalable, cost-effective model deployment.

items.title: Starcloud Raises $170M for AI Data Centers in Low Earth Orbit
items.summary: Starcloud became a unicorn 17 months post-founding with $170M to build orbital AI data centers. This innovative approach addresses terrestrial compute constraints.

items.title: Big Tech Hyperscalers to Spend $700B on AI Infrastructure in 2026
items.summary: Major tech firms project $700 billion in AI infrastructure spending this year with no slowdown visible. SoftBank plans to IPO AI robotics firm Roze amid the frenzy.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: RAID Shadow Legends Announces Dual Events for May 1st
items.summary: RAID Shadow Legends is launching a 2x event for summoning epic and legendary champions from ancient shards and a simultaneous 10x event for glorious palace summons starting Friday, May 1st.

items.title: Valorant Implements Ranked Reset After One Game
items.summary: Valorant has rolled out a soft ranked reset, where players receive their new rank immediately after playing just one game.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
